analysis.summary: The United States and Israel launched major joint military strikes against Iran beginning February 28, 2026, initiating a conflict now in its fourth week. While the Trump administration has offered a 15-point ceasefire plan and claimed ongoing peace talks, Iran has publicly rejected the proposal and denied that formal negotiations are taking place. Simultaneously, both sides continue military operations, with Iran blocking the Strait of Hormuz, firing missiles at Israel, and the US deploying additional troops to the region.
